message:
test(alloc): add 20 unit tests for PaneArenaRegistry and allocator types (ft-3axa)

Comprehensive test coverage for the frankenterm-alloc crate:

- AllocatorBackend: as_str(), jemalloc_enabled() consistency
- AllocatorStats: default is zeroed
- ArenaId: raw() accessor
- PaneArena: accessors, equality
- Arena<T>: as_mut() modification, into_inner()
- ReserveOutcome: Created/Existing predicates and arena access
- PaneArenaRegistry: get() hit/miss, release/set_tracked_bytes on
  nonexistent panes, stats on nonexistent, multi-pane independence,
  peak watermark tracking, monotonic arena IDs, stats_snapshot
  sorting and content, PaneArenaStats default

Total alloc tests: 26 (was 6).

Build: cargo test -p frankenterm-alloc --lib
All 26 pass (0.00s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
